name: cmd-participant-data-dictionaries
title: AMP-CMD participant data dictionaries (Frictionless Table Schema)
description: Value-set schemas for the harmonized AMP-CMD tissue-atlas participant data, one resource per study, one field per column. Coded responses (incl. 97/99 special codes, NA, unknown) kept as categories; value=source value (KPMP REDCap codes; CELLxGENE obs labels). Empty value sets are gated (FUSION).

fields.name: np_age
fields.description: Participant age (released as range in open file)

fields.name: np_latino_yn
fields.description: Hispanic, Latino, or of Spanish origin?

fields.name: sc_disease_type
fields.description: Which condition applies to this participant?

fields.name: max_kdigo_scrC
fields.description: Maximum KDIGO stage by serum creatinine (AKI only)

fields.name: ckd_stageC
fields.description: CKD stage / KDIGO risk (CKD or DN-Resistor; from uACR & eGFR)

fields.name: mh_diabetes_yn
fields.description: Told by provider you have diabetes?

fields.name: mh_ht_yn
fields.description: Told you have high blood pressure/hypertension?

categories.label: High School Graduate, GED or Equivalent
Not applicable - does not work outside the home

fields.name: income
fields.description: Total combined family income, past 12 months

categories.label: Every day or almost every day
Less than once a month but at least once in past 12 months
Not at all in past 12 months
Never had any beverage containing alcohol

fields.name: mh_id_sedative
fields.description: Illicit/recreational drug use: Sedatives (e.g., pentobarbital, Halcion, Tuinal)

fields.name: mh_id_painkiller
fields.description: Illicit/recreational drug use: Painkillers (e.g., Demerol, Vicodin, OxyContin)

fields.name: mh_id_mj
fields.description: Illicit/recreational drug use: Marijuana (weed, pot, dope)

fields.name: mh_id_stimulant
fields.description: Illicit/recreational drug use: Stimulants (e.g., Dexedrine, speed, amphetamine)

fields.name: mh_id_club
fields.description: Illicit/recreational drug use: Club drugs (e.g., ecstasy, GHB, Rohypnol, ketamine)

fields.name: op_bun
fields.description: Enrollment central-lab plasma: Blood urea nitrogen (mg/dL)

fields.name: ah_hd_crrt_m5
fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day m5 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.name: ah_hd_crrt_m4
fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day m4 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.name: ah_hd_crrt_m3
fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day m3 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day m2 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day m1 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.name: ah_hd_crrt_d0
fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day d0 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.name: ah_hd_crrt_d1
fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day d1 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.name: ah_hd_crrt_d2
fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day d2 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day d3 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.name: ah_hd_crrt_d4
fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day d4 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.name: ah_hd_crrt_d5
fields.description: AKI hospitalization dialysis modality, day d5 relative to biopsy (m=before, d=on/after)

fields.name: ah_hd_yn
fields.description: Hemodialysis at any time during AKI hospitalization

fields.description: CRRT at any time during AKI hospitalization
